MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Plaintiff, Ray Gajiwala appeared in pro per and there being no appearance by Defendant, Kevin Joseph Fitzpatrick, the matter was removed from settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Janet Pond. There being being no appearance by either party, the Court ordered the matter off calendar. Trial date is vacated.
